General.Name: Times Universal Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Times Universal Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the hotel operation activities in the People's Republic of China and Canada. It offers property management services; catering management services, such as kitchen management and delivering quality ingredients. The company was formerly known as Forebase International Holdings Limited and changed its name to Times Universal Group Holdings Limited in July 2020. The company was incorporated in 1987 and is based in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong. Times Universal Group Holdings Limited operates as a subsidiary of Great Match International Limited.
General.Address: Workington Tower, Sheung Wan, Hong Kong
